docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C&H INTERNATIONAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, VINCENT DBA EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL, EXPRESS INC $1,035.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,175.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,076.40 FILED BY C&H INTERNATIONAL AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VINCENT DBA EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL, EXPRESS INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-19-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-26-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-19-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR A RESET COURT DATE RECEIVED VIA MAIL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-26-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-29-2013 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID CHIEN--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00);DOCUMENT RECEIVED **AFTER MAR-26-2013 COURT DATE** SERVED FEB-19-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, VINCENT DBA EASTWIND INTERNATIONAL, EXPRESS INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C&H INTERNATIONAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-29-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-29-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAVID CHIEN--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE. SERVICE FEE $35.00. FILED BY PLAINTIFF C&H INTERNATIONAL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF C&H INTERNATIONAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-29-2013 - JUDGMENT.
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED 4/30/13 TO THE DEFENDANT VINCENT LEE, "RETURNED TO SENDER/NO SUCH STREET/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
